description: Create a stunning visual representation of deep space using only a neon color palette.
task_details: Submit one original .PNG or .TIFF file. Resolution must be at least 3000x2000px. AI-generated entries are not permitted for this specific round.

description: A 48-hour hackathon to build a mobile solution for local recycling tracking.
task_details: Develop a functional MVP. Your submission must include a GitHub repository link and a 2-minute video demo explaining the core logic.

description: Design a brand identity for a new sustainable fashion line called 'EverThread'.
task_details: The logo must be monochrome and work at small scales (favicon size). Provide a brief 100-word rationale behind your design choices.
